samples.xml_description:
<module id="pulse_detect">
    <description>Design a 1-bit pulse detection unit. The input signal data_in is triggered by clk. When data_in changes from 0 to 1 to 0 (3 cycles), it is considered a pulse. The output signal data_out is 1 at the end of the pulse, and returns to 0 until the next pulse.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Reset signal (active low).</input>
        <input id="data_in">1-bit input signal.</input>
        <output id="data_out">Output signal indicating the presence of pulses.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="s_idle">Idle state.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_w0">Wait for 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_w1">Wait for 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_w0">Wait for 0.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_w1">Wait for 1.</parameter>
        <parameter id="s_w1">Wait for 1.</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <reg type="sequential_logic" id="state">State register.</reg>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <always>
            <s_if>Reset condition (~rst_n)</s_if>
            <s_if>State transition logic</s_if>
            <s_if>Output logic</s_if>
        </always>
    </implementation>
</module>
